zh.lifeSummary: 當Geoffroy III d'ASPREMONT de DUN於大約1255年出生時，他的父親Gobert VII d’Aspremont, Seigneur d’Aspremont39歲，母親Agnès de Coucy-Vervins31歲。他於1285年與Isabelle de Quievrain, Dame de Quiévrain et d’Amblise結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1302年7月11日在比利時維斯吉福拉安德倫可特利可享年48歲，埋葬在荷蘭武特雷特可特利可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Geoffroy III d'ASPREMONT de DUN于大约1255年出生时，他的父亲Gobert VII d’Aspremont, Seigneur d’Aspremont39岁，母亲Agnès de Coucy-Vervins31岁。他于1285年与Isabelle de Quievrain, Dame de Quiévrain et d’Amblise结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1302年7月11日在比利时維斯吉福拉安德倫可特利可享年48岁，埋葬在荷兰武特雷特可特利可。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: DUN
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Dun in Angus.

variants.name: Dunn
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Duinn, Ó Doinn ‘descendant of Donn’, a byname meaning ‘brown-haired’ or ‘chieftain’. Compare Dunne . This name has sometimes been Anglicized as Brown .
English: nickname for a dark complexioned or swarthy man, from Middle English dun ‘dun, dark’ (Old English dunn ‘dull brown’).
Scottish: habitational name from Dun in Angus, named with Gaelic dùn ‘fort’. Compare Dun .

nameMeanings.name: Geoffroy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic (Frankish and Lombard) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It was in regular use among the counts of Anjou, ancestors of the English royal house of Plantagenet, who were descended from Geoffrey Plantagenet, Count of Anjou ( 1113–51 ). It was a particularly popular name in England and France in the later Middle Ages; notable bearers in England include the poet Geoffrey Chaucer ( c.1340–1400 ) and in Wales the chronicler Geoffrey of Monmouth ( d. 1155 ). The original form and meaning of the name is disputed. According to one theory, it is merely a variant of Godfrey ; others derive the first part from the Germanic word gawia ‘territory’, walah ‘stranger’, or gisil ‘pledge’. Medieval forms can be found to support all these theories, and it is possible that several names have fallen together, or that the name was subjected to reanalysis by folk etymology at an early date.

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Geoffroy III d'ASPREMONT de DUN was born about 1255, his father, Gobert VII d’Aspremont, Seigneur d’Aspremont, was 39 and his mother, Agnès de Coucy-Vervins, was 31. He married Isabelle de Quievrain, Dame de Quiévrain et d’Amblise in 1285. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 5 daughters. He died on 11 July 1302, in Kortrijk, West Flanders, Belgium, at the age of 48, and was buried in Kortrijk, Utrecht, Netherlands.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Geoffroy III d'ASPREMONT de DUN est né environ 1255, son père, Gobert VII d’Aspremont, Seigneur d’Aspremont, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Agnès de Coucy-Vervins, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Isabelle de Quievrain, Dame de Quiévrain et d’Amblise en 1285. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 11 juillet 1302, à Kortrijk, Flandre occidentale, Belgique, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterré à Kortrijk, Utrecht, Pays-Bas.

de.lifeSummary: Als Geoffroy III d'ASPREMONT de DUN um 1255 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gobert VII d’Aspremont, Seigneur d’Aspremont 39 und seine Mutter Agnès de Coucy-Vervins 31. Er hat 1285 Isabelle de Quievrain, Dame de Quiévrain et d’Amblise geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 11. Juli 1302 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Kortrijk, West-Flandern, Belgien und wurde in Kortrijk, Utrecht, Niederlande begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffroy III d'ASPREMONT de DUN è nato il circa 1255, il suo padre, Gobert VII d’Aspremont, Seigneur d’Aspremont, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Agnès de Coucy-Vervins, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Isabelle de Quievrain, Dame de Quiévrain et d’Amblise nel 1285. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 5 figlie. Morì il 11 luglio 1302, nel Kortrijk, Fiandra Occidentale, Belgio, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolto a Kortrijk, Utrecht, Paesi Bassi.

ja.lifeSummary: Geoffroy III d'ASPREMONT de DUNが約1255年に生まれた時，父Gobert VII d’Aspremont, Seigneur d’Aspremontは39歳，母Agnès de Coucy-Vervinsは31歳であった。1285年にIsabelle de Quievrain, Dame de Quiévrain et d’Ambliseと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1302年7月11日にベルギーウエスト-vラアンデレンコルトリジクで48歳で死去し，オランダウトレチトコルトリジクにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Geoffroy III d'ASPREMONT de DUN(이)가 대략 1255년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gobert VII d’Aspremont, Seigneur d’Aspremont(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnès de Coucy-Vervins(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1285년 Isabelle de Quievrain, Dame de Quiévrain et d’Amblise(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1302년 7월 11일 벨기에 웨스트-블라아더 코르트리j크에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 네덜란드 우트레ch트 코르트리j크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffroy III d'ASPREMONT de DUN nasceu aproximadamente 1255, seu pai, Gobert VII d’Aspremont, Seigneur d’Aspremont, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Agnès de Coucy-Vervins, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabelle de Quievrain, Dame de Quiévrain et d’Amblise em 1285. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 11 de julho de 1302, em Kortrijk, Flandres Ocidental, Bélgica, com 48 anos, e foi sepultado em Kortrijk, Utrecht, Países Baixos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Geoffroy III d'ASPREMONT de DUN родился около 1255 г., его отцу по имени Gobert VII d’Aspremont, Seigneur d’Aspremont было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnès de Coucy-Vervins, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabelle de Quievrain, Dame de Quiévrain et d’Amblise в 1285 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 5 дочерей. Он умер 11 июля 1302 г. в местности кортриджк, вест-влаандирен, Бельгия в возрасте 48 лет и был похоронен в местности кортриджк, утречт, Нидерланды.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Geoffroy III d'ASPREMONT de DUN nació aproximadamente 1255, su papá, Gobert VII d’Aspremont, Seigneur d’Aspremont, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Agnès de Coucy-Vervins, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Isabelle de Quievrain, Dame de Quiévrain et d’Amblise en 1285. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 5 hijas. Murió el 11 de julio de 1302, en Kortrijk, Flandes Occidental, Bélgica, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultado en Kortrijk, Utrecht, Países Bajos.
